prompt: Review a plan to add Redis caching to NL suggestions when DB caching already exists

assertions.text: Identifies at least 4 distinct caching layers: Postgres repo, inflight dedup Map, schema fingerprint keying, and frontend Zustand store
Identifies that getSuggestions() is a pure cache read that NEVER calls the LLM
Identifies that pg_notify would race with existing synchronous invalidation (regenerateProjectNlSuggestionsSilently calls)
Explains why TTL-based expiry contradicts the fingerprint-based design (suggestions don't go stale with time, only schema changes)
Lists specific files the plan forgot to include (config.ts, package.json, scripts/dev/run.mjs, or test files)
Notes that existing caches are colocated with services (queryCache.ts, answerService.ts) not in a separate cache/ directory
Proposes an alternative with a concrete size estimate (e.g., '~15 lines', 'zero dependencies')
Identifies that the plan has no test strategy and enumerates specific test types needed
References at least 3 specific line numbers from the actual codebase
